sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION (USERID, MAINTYPE, SUBTYPE, NOTICONTENT, SENDERID, SENDERNAME, REGDATE, ETCDATA, LINKURL, LINKURL_MOBILE, VIEWTYPE, VIEWWIDTH, VIEWHEIGHT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#recipientId#, #mainType#, #subType#, #notiContent#, #senderId#, #senderName#, #regDate#, #etcData#, #linkUrl#, #linkUrlMobile#, #viewType#, #viewWidth#, #viewHeight#, #tenantId#, #companyId#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND ISREAD = 'N'

SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, SENDERNAME AS senderName, DATE_ADD(REGDATE, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE DATE_ADD(READDATE, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N' ORDER BY REGDATE DESC LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION SET
ISREAD = 'Y', READDATE = #processDate#
ISDELETE = 'Y', DELETEDATE = #processDate#
WHERE NOTISEQ = #notiSeq# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION SET
ISREAD = 'Y', READDATE = #processDate#
ISDELETE = 'Y', DELETEDATE = #processDate#
WHERE USERID = #userId#
AND ISREAD = 'Y'
AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '\'', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE CONCAT('%',#keyWord#,'%')
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
) A
WHERE ISREAD = 'N'

SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, SENDERNAME AS senderName, DATE_ADD(REGDATE, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE DATE_ADD(READDATE, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '\'', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE CONCAT('%',#keyWord#,'%')
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, SENDERNAME AS senderName, DATE_ADD(REGDATE, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE DATE_ADD(READDATE, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '\'', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE CONCAT('%',#keyWord#,'%')
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
AND notiseq < #lastNotiSeq#
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC, notiseq desc LIMIT #rowCount#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#storagePeriod# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='notiStoragePeriod' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE DATEDIFF(DATE_ADD(#nowDate#, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE), DATE_ADD(REGDATE, INTERVAL #offSet# MINUTE)) > #notiStoragePeriod# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND REGDATE > #pollStime# and REGDATE <= #pollEtime#

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU TPM INNER JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP TPMC ON TPM.MENU_ID = TPMC.MENU_ID AND TPM.MENUCODE = 'approval' AND TPMC.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TPMC.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TPM.MENU_URL = '/ezApprovalG/apprGMain.do' AND TPMC.MENU_USED = '1'
